news.headline: Visual Comfort & Co. opens 4,000 sq-ft showroom in Alpharetta, GA featuring diverse lighting, design partner collections.
news.summary: Houston-based company Visual Comfort & Co. has revealed the launch of its new showroom in Alpharetta. Spanning 4,000 square feet, the showroom features a wide array of lighting options across various categories and styles, encompassing design partner collections like Suzanne Kasler.

news.headline: Trend Micro scored 100% coverage rate in MITRE ATT&CK Evaluations, leaving attackers nowhere to hide.
news.summary: In a recent report on December 11, 2024, Trend Micro Incorporated, a top global cybersecurity company listed as TYO: 4704 and TSE: 4704, unveiled its powerful defense system, Trend Vision One™. This groundbreaking technology ensures attackers have no escape routes by providing robust security measures. The company showcased remarkable performance in the most recent MITRE ATT&CK® Evaluations, further solidifying its position as a leader in the cybersecurity industry.

news.headline: South Africa Flour and Grain Mill Products Manufacturing Industry Report by 2024 featuring top players Pioneer Foods, Tiger Brands, and more - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A new report titled "Manufacture of Flour and Grain Mill Products Industry in South Africa" has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report delves into the production of flour and grain mill products in South Africa, particularly the milling of maize and wheat. It covers details on production levels, consumption patterns, commodity and food prices, as well as consumption trends and future production forecasts. The report also features insights on significant industry players, key trends, pressing issues, and factors influencing the market.

news.headline: Global e-methane market forecast for 2024-2034 shows significant growth due to increased focus on sustainable energy solutions.
news.summary: A report on the global e-methane market has been released, forecasting a substantial growth potential from 2024 to 2034. The market analysis focuses on end-use industries, forms and storage, production technology, carbon capture sources, and regions. With the increasing shift towards sustainable energy solutions and decarbonization initiatives in challenging sectors, the e-methane market is expected to experience significant expansion. This growth trend presents lucrative opportunities for stakeholders and businesses operating in the industry.

news.headline: Gotransverse and Nextian are partnering to streamline Quote-to-Cash processes with automated pricing and operations, revolutionizing the industry in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Gotransverse and Nextian have formed a partnership to integrate CPQ and billing systems. This collaboration aims to streamline pricing procedures and enhance operational efficiency for Quote-to-Cash processes.

news.headline: Ireland's RegTech market forecast 18.7% CAGR during 2024-2029, set to reach US$790.67 million by 2029 - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on Ireland's RegTech industry highlights significant growth opportunities. The sector is projected to expand by 28.7% annually, reaching a value of US$335.27 million by 2024. The report provides comprehensive data on key performance indicators such as market size, industry breakdown, technology usage, product types, deployment methods, and market share. This growth trend is expected to continue steadily in the coming years, indicating a promising outlook for RegTech in Ireland.

news.headline: Blackhawk Network & Gopuff team up to offer fast gift card delivery with online grocery orders. Just in time for the holidays.
news.summary: Conveniently timed for the upcoming holiday shopping rush, consumers in Pleasanton, California can now include physical gift cards in their online grocery purchases and have them swiftly delivered to their homes. A recent collaboration between Blackhawk Network (BHN), a renowned global branded payments provider, and Instant Commerce platform Gopuff allows customers to purchase physical gift cards from a selection of top brands for immediate delivery with their order of numerous everyday necessities like groceries, alcohol, and holiday baking items. This partnership brings the ease of obtaining physical gift cards alongside essential items to shoppers, offering them a wide range of choices in a hassle-free manner.

news.headline: BIC undergoes significant governance changes, altering long-standing structures to adapt to the modern era.
InventHelp inventor creates EXPANDA RACK, a new cargo rack for bicycles, as alternative to traditional racks.
news.summary: An inventor from Houston, Texas shared the inspiration behind his creation of the EXPANDA RACK in Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024. His goal was to find a more efficient method of transporting larger and heavier items on a bicycle. This innovative design represents a new option compared to regular bicycle cargo racks, showing promise for improved functionality. The inventor's motivation led to the development of a product that could potentially revolutionize the way cyclists handle cumbersome loads, with significant implications for the cycling community.

news.headline: Bechtler Museum to exhibit "Virginia Jaramillo: Principle of Equivalence," first major retrospective, from Feb 8 - June 8, 2025.
news.summary: A comprehensive exhibition showcasing the revolutionary work of Latina artist Virginia Jaramillo throughout her remarkable six-decade career will be held from February 8 to June 8, 2025. This retrospective will take place in Charlotte, North Carolina. The Bechtler Museum of Modern Art is spearheading this initiative to broaden the representation of global modernism. Known as "Virginia Jaramillo: Principle," this exhibit is set to shed light on the artist's impactful contributions.

news.headline: Domino® Sugar shares 10 holiday baking pitfalls to avoid for sweet success. Important date: Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on December 11, 2024, it was reported that during the holiday season, baking is a popular activity for creating cherished memories. However, the rush of the season can lead to errors that may ruin your baked treats. Domino® Sugar, a well-known brand in American households, shared insights on the top 10 common mistakes to avoid while baking.

news.headline: CREDIT AGRICOLE SA notified of Pillar 2 capital requirement.
Éric Donnet joins Argan's supervisory board, expanding its leadership team. #appointment
clearer.io integrates Rich Returns platform with Shop app, revolutionizing eCommerce returns on Shopify.
news.summary: A company based in Irvine, California, clearer.io, known for its eCommerce solutions, recently revealed the successful integration of its Rich Returns platform with the Shop app by Shopify. This partnership focuses on utilizing the Shop Minis feature, aiming to enhance the shopping experience for users and boost efficiency. The integration was officially announced on December 11, 2024, marking a significant milestone for both companies in the eCommerce sector. This move is expected to impact a large number of users of the Shop app, underlining the commitment of both clearer.io and Shopify to innovative solutions within the industry.

news.headline: Certified Labs approved by Amazon as TIC for skin-lightening and ophthalmic products. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Certified Laboratories, a subsidiary of Certified Group based in Burbank, California, has been officially recognized as an Amazon-approved Testing, Inspection, and Certification (TIC) company. This accreditation allows the company to conduct necessary testing and validate Certificate of Analysis (COAs) in accordance with Amazon's policy requirements. The announcement was made on December 11, 2024, via a press release.

news.headline: David S. Brown Enterprises named a 2024 Top Workplace by The Baltimore Sun for the third year in a row.
news.summary: In exciting news out of Baltimore on December 11, 2024, David S. Brown Enterprises has been named a Top Workplace for 2024 by The Baltimore Sun for the third year in a row. This honor places them among the top medium-sized employers in the region, showcasing their commitment to excellence and employee satisfaction.

news.headline: Ageas and The Goldman Sachs Group disclosed a transparency notification with over 3% of voting rights in Ageas.
Ageas and The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc: Transparency notification
Reservations now open for Chicago Restaurant Week 2025 with 200+ participating restaurants. Visit eatitupchicago.com.
news.summary: Chicago's beloved annual dining event, organized by Choose Chicago, is now accepting reservations. The city's official destination marketing organization, Choose Chicago, has revealed that the highly awaited Chicago Restaurant event is back. The reservations for this experience are now live, starting from December 11, 2024. This event is a favorite among locals and visitors alike, offering a unique dining experience in the vibrant city of Chicago. Be sure to secure your spot soon, as demand is expected to be high for this year's event.

news.headline: FDA requests White House approval to reduce nicotine levels in cigarettes significantly as a last resort.
news.summary: The agency has requested the White House to proceed with initiatives to significantly decrease the addictive substance in conventional tobacco cigarettes. This move aims to lower the dependency potential of these cigarettes and promote public health.

news.headline: SEC moves forward with NYSE’s request to list Bitwise BTC and ETH ETF. Public feedback sought on the move.
news.summary: The financial regulator in the United States is currently seeking feedback on the application made by the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) to list the cryptocurrency index ETF proposed by Bitwise. Comments and opinions are being welcomed regarding this matter.

news.headline: ADM's Board extends stock buyback program, previously set at 200M shares, for an additional 5 years.
news.summary: Chicago-based company, ADM (NYSE: ADM), has recently extended its share repurchase program as per an announcement from the Board of Directors. The original plan, which spanned over 5 years, allowed the buyback of 100,000,000 shares of ADM stock between January 1, 2015, and December 31, 2019. In 2019, this program was prolonged until December 31, 2024, with the share buyback limit increased to 200,000,000 shares. The Board has further decided to extend the program for an additional five years, approving the repurchase of up to another 100,0...

news.headline: Cyrus Biotechnology reveals powerful in vivo redosability of engineered IdeS protease for IgG-driven autoimmune disease, no anti-drug antibodies detected.
news.summary: Cyrus Biotechnology has reported significant progress in their latest study, revealing strong in vivo redosability of an engineered IdeS protease designed for IgG-mediated autoimmune conditions in Seattle. This breakthrough showcases promising results in the treatment of autoimmune diseases, with the engineered protease demonstrating high effectiveness in preclinical experiments. This development marks a significant advancement in the field, offering new hope for individuals suffering from such conditions.

news.headline: Sea Street Technologies debuts EdgeSentinel™, a cybersecurity platform for network service providers on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Leading the way in autonomous network cybersecurity and edge intelligence solutions, Sea Street Technologies has introduced EdgeSentinel™, a cutting-edge threat intelligence and data-powered cybersecurity platform for Network Service Providers. The launch took place on December 11, 2024, showcasing the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements. This initiative aims to revolutionize cybersecurity practices among service providers, leveraging advanced technologies to enhance protection against threats. EdgeSentinel™ is poised to play a pivotal role in safeguarding networks, utilizing innovative approaches to ensure the security of digital infrastructure. This development signifies a significant stride towards enhancing cybersecurity measures in the digital landscape.

news.headline: Susan G. Komen honors 5 leaders for contributions to breast cancer research and patient care in San Antonio. Awards include Brinker Awards and Research Advocate Champion Award.
news.summary: In San Antonio, Susan G. Komen®, a prominent breast cancer organization, is honoring five individuals for their significant contributions to breast cancer research. These individuals have made strides in enhancing our knowledge of breast cancer risk and metastasis, creating personalized treatment plans, and advocating for breast cancer research and education. The awards include the Brinker Awards, Rising Star Researcher Award, and Research Advocate Champion Award, which are recognized as the most prestigious honors given by Komen. These accolades are awarded annually to individuals who have dedicated their careers to advancing breast cancer awareness.

news.headline: FHLB of Cincinnati elects Brady, Vance, Collins, Darby for 4-year terms; Uridil as chair; Pell as vice chair. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Brady, Vance, Collins, and Darby have been elected to serve four-year terms on the Federal Home Loan Bank of Cincinnati's Board of Directors. Uridil will step in as the board chair, with Pell serving as the vice chair. The elections results were publicized on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Echogen Power Systems appoints Robert Bernard as CCO, with 23 years of experience in energy and tech sectors.
news.summary: In Akron, Ohio, on December 11, 2024, Echogen Power Systems, a prominent company known for its cutting-edge clean energy solutions, revealed the selection of Robert Bernard as the Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). With more than 23 years of expertise in the energy and technology industries, Bernard's appointment signifies a strategic move for the company.

news.headline: Inventor from Houston creates MAFRIGE EYE GLASSES for secure eyewear storage, prevents falling, scratching.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Houston, Texas shared their inspiration for creating the MAFRIGE EYE GLASSES. The inventor believed there was room for improvement in securing glasses to a shirt collar or pocket when not in use. The innovative design aims to prevent glasses from falling and getting scratched, introducing a new way to keep eyewear safe and easily accessible.

news.headline: Rare Chartreuse collection with 400 lots spanning 150 years to be auctioned in NYC by Acker, featuring prized bottlings incl. 1878 Yellow Chartreuse.
news.summary: An upcoming auction with a single owner will showcase 400 lots of rare spirits spanning 150 years of history. This includes sought-after Fourvoirie and Tarragone-era bottlings, as well as a rare 1878 Yellow Chartreuse. Set to take place in New York on December 11, 2024, this event by Acker, the world's biggest rare wine and spirits auction house, promises to be a significant opportunity for collectors.

news.headline: Ergo Company's "Old Righteous Blues" - South African film contending for an Oscar, explores cultural identity and resilience.
news.summary: A South African film titled "Old Righteous Blues" has been making waves, showcasing themes of identity, resilience, and redemption. This visually striking masterpiece explores cultural complexities, garnering significant attention as it vies for Oscar recognition. The film captures the essence of South African storytelling, bridging diverse cultures and touching the hearts of audiences worldwide. With its powerful narrative and captivating visuals, "Old Righteous Blues" stands out with impressive cinematography and a poignant storyline that resonates with viewers.

news.headline: Anxiety elevates risks for inflammatory bowel disease flares, according to SonarMD data at AIBD Conference in Orlando.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, SonarMD recently shared new findings at the AIBD Conference regarding the correlation between anxiety and increased disease activity risk. The presentation discussed the association between anxiety levels and the likelihood of experiencing heightened disease activity. This research sheds light on the importance of addressing mental health concerns in patients with medical conditions. The study presented by SonarMD provides valuable insights into the potential impact of anxiety on disease progression.

news.headline: Five9 (Nasdaq: FIVN) wins 2024 Aragon Research Innovation Award for AI Contact Centers, named Leader in two Aragon Research Globe™ reports.
news.summary: San Ramon, California-based company Five9 has recently been awarded the 2024 Aragon Research Innovation Award for AI Contact Centers. Furthermore, the company has achieved Leader status in two Aragon Research Globe™ reports for the year 2025. Specifically, Five9 was recognized in the categories of AI Agent Platforms in Intelligent Contact Center (ICC) and overall Intelligent Contact Center. These accolades highlight Five9's exceptional position as a frontrunner in AI-enhanced customer experience (CX).

news.headline: Fivetran named Challenger in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration, marks fifth appearance, second year in this role.
news.summary: Fivetran, a leading data movement company based in Oakland, California, has been named a Challenger in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools. This is the fifth year in a row that Fivetran has been included in the report and the second consecutive year as a Challenger. The company sees this recognition as a testament to its commitment to innovation and making data integration easier for businesses of various scales. Gartner Magic Quadrant reports are highly regarded in the industry.

news.headline: American Water Charitable Foundation donated $500,000 to charities nationwide on Giving Tuesday, giving $100 to each employee.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the American Water Charitable Foundation, a registered 501(c)(3) organization founded by American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., revealed that it allocated close to $500,000 to charities nationwide throughout its weeklong Giving Tuesday event. To encourage community involvement and commemorate Giving Tuesday, the Foundation issued $100 to each employee through their Giving Rewards Account for contributions to eligible causes.

news.headline: Xi Jinping's military plans scrutinized as Trump nears comeback, according to Bloomberg.
In 2024, Crypto money altered US politics as a few execs shifted election spending, with wide-reaching impacts.
news.summary: In the current year, a small group of cryptocurrency executives have significantly altered the way in which companies allocate funds for elections. The impact of their success is anticipated to have far-reaching implications beyond the realm of cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Smartsheet released 2025 Project and Portfolio Management Priorities Report: 92% struggle with workplace changes. (86)
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Smartsheet (NYSE: SMAR) has unveiled a new study on the impact of workplace modifications on project and portfolio management (PPM) experts in the 2025 Project and Portfolio Management Priorities Report. The report indicates that 92% of PPM professionals find it challenging to adjust to workplace transformations, which include frequent changes in priorities, communication and collaboration gaps.

news.headline: Direxion introduces new leveraged and inverse ETFs for Berkshire Hathaway and Palantir (BRKU, BRKD, PLTU, PLTD) NYC, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Direxion, a prominent ETF provider, has introduced four new Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs (BRKU, BRKD, PLTU, PLTD) to their existing lineup of 22 ETFs. This announcement was made on December 11, 2024, in New York. The new offerings aim to provide traders with more options for leveraged and inverse exposure to specific stocks. The expansion of their product range reflects Direxion's commitment to meeting the demands of investors seeking innovative investment opportunities.

news.headline: Sea Love Marina in Ponce Inlet, Florida sold for $22M by SVN Marinas. Specialists David Kendall and Carl Lentz collaborated on the $21,960,000 sale.
news.summary: In Ponce Inlet, Florida on December 11, 2024, David Kendall, a national marina specialist from SVN Nautilus, partnered with Carl Lentz from SVN Alliance in Ormond Beach to finalize the sale of Down the Hatch Seafood Restaurant and Sea Love for a total of $21,960,000.

news.headline: The REMM Group to manage The Sandpiper Apartments in Huntington Beach, Orange County, improving value of multifamily properties.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Huntington Beach, California, The REMM Group, a leading property management firm focused on optimizing multifamily properties' worth, revealed its selection for managing The Sandpiper Apartments. The company is enthusiastic about this opportunity to oversee the property's operations, ensuring its continued success.

news.headline: Global 3D Printing Materials Market valued at USD 5962.2 Million by 2030, segmented by type and application.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on Dec. 11, 2024, it was reported that the Global 3D Printing Materials Market is divided into different types such as Engineering Plastics, Photosensitive Resin, Metallic Material, and Ceramic Material. The market is segmented based on application fields including Aerospace, Military, and Medicine. Key statistics and figures were mentioned, but specific details were not provided.

news.headline: Tesla stock nears record high of 414.50 from Nov 2021 after three years, eyes new peak today.
news.summary: Currently, Tesla stock is hovering slightly below its peak of 414.50, which was reached in November 2021. The possibility of surpassing this record high after three years has garnered attention from investors. The question on whether Tesla will achieve this milestone today is being raised.

news.headline: Mindbreeze to showcase AI-powered Insight Workplace at AI Summit NYC in New York City.
news.summary: Mindbreeze will be introducing its innovative Insight Workplace at the upcoming AI Summit in New York City.

news.headline: NSSF and partners launch "Project ChildSafe Louisville", distributing 6,000 free gun locks in Kentucky to promote firearm safety.
news.summary: In an effort to promote safe firearm storage and reduce accidents, NSSF and its partners are giving away 6,000 free gun locks to residents in Kentucky. The distribution will take place in Louisville. The initiative is part of NSSF's Project ChildSafe program, aiming to educate the public on the importance of securely storing firearms.

news.headline: Inventor creates smart message board named BRIGHT MESSAGE to communicate easily in homes, offices, and schools.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Houston, Texas, shared details about their creation of the BRIGHT MESSAGE smart message board, aimed at facilitating communication within various settings such as homes, offices, and schools. The innovative design offers instant updates to all users in a group. This invention has the potential to revolutionize how information is disseminated within a group setting.

news.headline: Top 10 S&P 500 stocks may surge 50% by 2025, a report suggests.
Mecho releases EPDs for motorized shades, a first in the industry, showing commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in New York, Mecho, a top provider of commercial shading solutions, introduced Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) for motorized shade systems, marking a pioneering move in the shading sector. This initiative highlights Mecho's dedication to sustainability efforts and transparency.

news.headline: Tambourine opens new LATAM HQ in Bogotá, Colombia, showing commitment to region's growth. #DigitalMarketing #Expansion
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Tambourine, a renowned digital marketing technology company, inaugurated its new Latin America (LATAM) headquarters in Bogotá, Colombia. This move demonstrates Tambourine's commitment to catering to the growing market in the region.

news.headline: Bitdefender excels in 2024 MITRE Engenuity ATT&CK® Evaluations with outstanding alert accuracy, critical for security efficiency.
news.summary: In Bucharest, Romania and Santa Clara, California, Bitdefender revealed outstanding achievements in the 2024 MITRE Engenuity ATT&CK® Enterprise Evaluations.

news.headline: Cynet achieves 100% protection & detection in 2024 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation with zero false positives. SMEs and MSPs benefit.
news.summary: A cybersecurity company based in Boston, Cynet, has made significant strides as the sole cybersecurity vendor in the 2024 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation. They managed to achieve impressive results, including 100% protection and 100% detection visibility without making any configuration changes. Additionally, Cynet was able to accomplish this feat without any false positive detections. This accomplishment is particularly notable as it demonstrates the capability of Cynet to provide comprehensive cybersecurity solutions for a variety of businesses, from small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs) to managed service providers (MSPs) and managed security service providers.
